name: Aarav Mehta
message: Hi! Saw your post on LinkedIn — we need help automating our customer onboarding workflow. Can we hop on a call this week? Budget is around 50k/month for the right partner.
suggested_reply: Hi there! We would love to help you automate your customer onboarding workflow and have open slots for a call this week. Please let us know what days work best for you, or you can book a time directly via our calendar link.

name: Priya Sharma
message: is your service free or paid? just exploring options for now
suggested_reply: Hi there! Our services are paid, but we offer a variety of flexible plans depending on your needs. I would be happy to send over our pricing guide for you to review.

name: Rohan Kapoor
message: To Whom It May Concern, I came across your business and would like to know more about your offerings. Please send me a brochure at your earliest convenience.
suggested_reply: Thank you for reaching out! I would be happy to send our latest company brochure detailing our services and offerings to your email right away.

name: Neha Patel
message: Hey team — I'm building a Shopify store and I need an automation that posts orders to a Slack channel and tags products by category using AI. Saw your work with similar clients. Can you take this on? Need it live by end of month.
suggested_reply: We'd love to help you build this Shopify and AI automation, and we can definitely hit your end-of-month deadline! Let's book a quick call to discuss the project details and get started—you can schedule a time here: [Link].

name: Vikram Singh
suggested_reply: Hello! How can I help you today?

name: Ananya Iyer
message: Hi, I'm the Ops Manager at a 200-person company. We're evaluating vendors for a 6-month engagement to streamline our internal ticketing and AI-assisted triage. Could you share case studies and a rough pricing range? Targeting RFP closure by mid-June.
suggested_reply: Hi there! We would love to share our relevant case studies and pricing details for your AI-assisted triage project. Could we schedule a brief call this week to discuss your RFP requirements and ensure we meet your mid-June timeline?

name: Saurabh Reddy
message: hi, I run a small content studio. need help setting up a workflow that takes a YouTube video transcript and turns it into LinkedIn posts + Instagram carousels automatically. willing to pay one-time fee for setup. when can we talk?
suggested_reply: Hi there! We would love to help you automate your content workflow and turn those YouTube transcripts into social posts. Let's schedule a call to discuss the setup—when are you free this week, or you can book directly here: [Calendar Link]?
